evals.prompt: 我想在知乎上搜索关于 Rust 入门的优质回答，返回 5 条结果。请告诉我应该用什么命令，以及命令会返回什么格式的数据。
evals.expected_output: 应该给出 `zhihu search zhihu "Rust 入门" --count 5` 命令，并说明输出是 PascalCase 字段的 JSON（Code, Message, Data.Items 等）。

assertions.name: correct_command
assertions.text: The response includes the exact command `zhihu search zhihu "Rust 入门" --count 5`

assertions.name: mentions_json_output
assertions.text: The response states that the output is JSON

assertions.name: mentions_items_array
assertions.text: The response describes the results as being under Data.Items (or Items), not a direct Data array

assertions.name: mentions_code_field
assertions.text: The response mentions the Code field (PascalCase success indicator)

evals.prompt: 我已经拿到了知乎开放平台的 Access Secret，想配置 zhihu-cli 然后用直答的 thinking 模型问一问：什么是 RAG？请给出完整步骤和命令。
evals.expected_output: 应该说明环境变量 `ZHIHU_ACCESS_SECRET` 或 `zhihu auth set-secret` 配置方式，然后给出 `zhihu ask "什么是 RAG？" --model thinking` 命令，并解释默认模型就是 thinking。

assertions.name: correct_ask_command
assertions.text: The response includes `zhihu ask "什么是 RAG？" --model thinking`

assertions.name: mentions_auth_method
assertions.text: The response mentions at least one authentication method (env var or zhihu auth set-secret)

assertions.name: mentions_env_precedence
assertions.text: The response notes that ZHIHU_ACCESS_SECRET env var takes precedence over config file

assertions.name: correct_config_path
assertions.text: The response gives the config file path as ~/.zhihu-cli/config.toml

evals.prompt: zhihu search global 的 --filter 参数怎么用？我想用它搜索 zhihu.com 上的内容可以吗？
evals.expected_output: 应该解释 filter 语法（host==, publish_time, AND/OR），并明确指出 `host=="zhihu.com"` 不支持，应该用 `zhihu search zhihu` 搜知乎内容。

assertions.name: mentions_host_syntax
assertions.text: The response explains the host=="..." filter syntax

assertions.name: mentions_combinators
assertions.text: The response mentions publish_time or AND/OR combinators

assertions.name: zhihu_com_not_supported
assertions.text: The response clearly states that host=="zhihu.com" is not supported in global search

assertions.name: recommends_zhihu_search
assertions.text: The response recommends using `zhihu search zhihu` for Zhihu-only content

evals.prompt: 我想看看现在知乎热榜前十有哪些内容，应该用哪个命令？
evals.expected_output: 应该给出 `zhihu hot --limit 10` 命令，并说明输出是 PascalCase 字段的 JSON（Code, Message, Data.Total, Data.Items 等），Items 里包含 Title、Url、ThumbnailUrl、Summary。

assertions.name: correct_command
assertions.text: The response includes the exact command `zhihu hot --limit 10`

assertions.name: mentions_json_output
assertions.text: The response states that the output is JSON

assertions.name: mentions_items_array
assertions.text: The response describes the results as being under Data.Items (or Items), not a direct Data array

assertions.name: mentions_limit_flag
assertions.text: The response mentions the --limit flag and its default/max behavior
